query:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW v_holdings_with_meta AS
SELECT 
  h.symbol,
  h.market_value / SUM(h.market_value) OVER () AS weight,
  h.market_value
FROM holdings h
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w4G5FWonHi6U6L.root --database aQvizP6Ne8LKEmBGrk5vq4 --execute CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW v_holdings_with_meta AS

  h.symbol,
  h.market_value / SUM(h.market_value) OVER () AS weight,
  h.market_value
FROM holdings h
